basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years as on 27-06-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: A medical Qualification included in the I or II schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956, A postgraduate qualification e.g. MD/MS or a recognized qualification equivalent thereto in the respective discipline/subject, Three years teaching and/or research experience in recognized Institution in the subject of specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of M.D. /M.S. or qualification recognized equivalent thereto (for general disciplines), D.M. in the respective discipline/subject for medical super specialties and M.Ch. in the respective discipline/subject for surgical super specialties (2 years or 3 years or 5 years recognized course) or a qualification recognized equivalent thereto, One-year teaching and/or research experience in a recognized Institution in the subject of specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of D.M./M.Ch. (2 years or 5 years recognized course after MBBS) or qualification recognized equivalent thereto
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (CTVS), Assistant Professor (Gastroenterology), Assistant Professor (General Medicine), Assistant Professor (Haematology), Assistant Professor (Nephrology), Assistant Professor (Neurosurgery), Assistant Professor (Surgical Gastroenterology), Assistant Professor (Surgical Oncology), Assistant Professor (Transfusion Medicine and Blood Bank): A medical Qualification included in the I or II schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956. A postgraduate qualification e.g. MD/MS or a recognized qualification equivalent thereto in the respective discipline/subject. Three years teaching and/or research experience in recognized Institution in the subject of specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of M.D. /M.S. or qualification recognized equivalent thereto (for general disciplines). D.M. in the respective discipline/subject for medical super specialties and M.Ch. in the respective discipline/subject for surgical super specialties (2 years or 3 years or 5 years recognized course) or a qualification recognized equivalent thereto. One-year teaching and/or research experience in a recognized Institution in the subject of specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of D.M./M.Ch. (2 years or 5 years recognized course after MBBS) or qualification recognized equivalent thereto. However, no experience is necessary for the candidates possessing the 3 years recognized degree of D.M/M.Ch. or qualification recognized equivalent thereto.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor (Transfusion Medicine and Blood Bank)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bhubaneswar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bhubaneswar Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Professor posts at AIIMS Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Assistant Professor posts at AIIMS Bhubaneswar is 27th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor positions at AIIMS Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a medical qualification included in the I or II schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956, along with a postgraduate qualification (MD/MS or equivalent) and relevant teaching/research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Assistant Professor posts is 50 years as of 27th June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 177,828 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official AIIMS Bhubaneswar website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: No, as per the notification, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor posts will be based on an Interview conducted in a Hybrid Mode.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Assistant Professor positions at AIIMS Bhubaneswar are on a contractual basis.
